scripts.desktop:test: node -e "const path = require('node:path'); const { pathToFileURL } = require('node:url'); const cwd = process.env.INIT_CWD || process.cwd(); const runner = path.resolve(cwd, 'apps/desktop/src/desktopTestRunner.mjs'); import(pathToFileURL(runner).href).then((module) => module.runDesktopTestsCli({ cwd }))"
